          586.Origin_Intro_Laezel: His contact in Baldur's Gate holds the means of releasing the one in the Prism, the means of the Githyanki Empire's destruction.

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e042144a-aedb-43e3-9dab-6489e41a1519Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h055c9cc8gaf99g4db0ga4dcg8241ed9ae27fText UUID: 32d9b2e9-d226-49b0-af7a-f6ab591a7931Group ID: 448b1808-0515-49fa-bce9-3ad42856f536Group Index: 1
          • +

          629.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Not since Vlaakith-One has a Baht t'Vlaakith been anointed.

        194.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Only that they have the means to let the Prism's occupant loose -

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4d97ba8a-749f-46f0-aae6-54673ace6bbcSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hd690ef68gda64g47c4g85f6g8a94bdeaed54Text UUID: 708e0d56-ce5a-4f4f-9382-5c31673191a6Timeline Phase Index: 93Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4d97ba8a-749f-46f0-aae6-54673ace6bbcTimeline Phase Duration: 23.64sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Group ID: 4d97ba8a-749f-46f0-aae6-54673ace6bbcGroup Index: 0
        • +
          409.Origin_Intro_Laezel: - and thus the means to end Vlaakith's reign and weaken the empire.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9d346993-ace3-40d8-b286-77f138e1a0e7Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h7e4681a6gc18ag4bf0ga608gedbb14d7e766Text UUID: 8dfc0a04-59e9-4a44-a0f0-1ddc3f65c336Group ID: 4d97ba8a-749f-46f0-aae6-54673ace6bbcGroup Index: 1
          • +
            75.Origin_Intro_Laezel: A ghaik? A githzerai, one of Zerthimon's separatists?

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 20d6ac01-bb89-4709-bc9b-79e4aca06c98Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hfeb5b281g713bg4902g9796g0f923b0e6fceText UUID: 35f67c82-d2bf-4782-927a-9f27c783cee1Group ID: 4d97ba8a-749f-46f0-aae6-54673ace6bbcGroup Index: 2
            • •
              328.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Of one thing, I'm most certain: I will kill them as I killed Voss, and Vlaakith will gift me with unspoiled silver.

              Metadata

        535.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Vlaakith is no tyrant.

          418.Origin_Intro_Laezel: A tyrant cracks her whip and eradicates the weak for her own advance.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a0803598-32cf-4e4c-8829-f73b2d927ec8Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h6d782434gc47bg4d96ga5cbgc355fc7b10e4Text UUID: 80c6775f-8a8d-42cb-9552-0420953b5544Group ID: cf732ee4-b569-4ef6-a77c-977907032c25Group Index: 1
          • +
            541.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Queen Vlaakith does so to prevent ghaik insurgence.

            Metadata

      • +
        387.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I'd never thought Vlaakith a tyrant, or me as a vassal. She was the source of my might, and I the envoy of her will.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 981a031a-04a3-45f7-82d4-487775eaae14Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h94b6838cgdfbdg44d3gbff0g46387c6c0464Text UUID: 4f8c7151-f6c2-4b81-8935-3be0854f4dfbTimeline Phase Index: 154Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 981a031a-04a3-45f7-82d4-487775eaae14Timeline Phase Duration: 40.11sTimeline Phase Shots: 9Group ID: 981a031a-04a3-45f7-82d4-487775eaae14Group Index: 0
        • +
          262.Origin_Intro_Laezel: A warrior. A champion. A destroyer.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6523d41b-fe85-4506-9f6a-1e99e381504dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hc4374b9eg2514g4455gb34dgf4d53cdd47d5Text UUID: b4af8d27-f386-4ef1-8f41-bc3cd5bdfd98Group ID: 981a031a-04a3-45f7-82d4-487775eaae14Group Index: 1
          • +
            121.Origin_Intro_Laezel: But if Voss is right, and Vlaakith consumes the ascended to gain power...

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 305a40fd-c402-4dd4-a145-659319d7e22fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h463f7096g0026g41adgaf21g3ff9a2be5689Text UUID: 1d3e80ce-75d4-4072-8bcb-ced4936c1696Group ID: 981a031a-04a3-45f7-82d4-487775eaae14Group Index: 2
            • +
              379.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Then I am no destroyer. I am mere livestock, bred to be harvested and devoured.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 92c8404a-7942-4e89-a29f-9e17b95d2b0aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hbaee973eg2a22g4f23ga528ga969516a9364Text UUID: 04c5d754-0a37-4672-b256-4bdb8e1fb899Group ID: 981a031a-04a3-45f7-82d4-487775eaae14Group Index: 3
              • +
                129.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Every githyanki is a slave with a singular purpose. Not to cull the ghaik, not to prevent their Grand Design -

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3455f4d4-c08d-4c96-8d30-e59cd7a0f76fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hd78b11bcge8c4g47b5g88ceg52e7da552a8cText UUID: 7b741fb1-77ed-420b-a644-8bff084a6373Group ID: 981a031a-04a3-45f7-82d4-487775eaae14Group Index: 4
                • •
                  187.Origin_Intro_Laezel: - but to raise Vlaakith to true godhood.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4c2a8f1f-c986-40fa-8ccb-c25981becc47Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h273a73feg8c21g4897gb842g7116718aac74Text UUID: 5944e724-d64b-462d-8727-4a39fe20cc7eGroup ID: 981a031a-04a3-45f7-82d4-487775eaae14Group Index: 5

        137.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Ascension is a young githyanki's greatest honour.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3828bf40-72df-47c6-8889-b49e0f7458daSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h2874ec1dg9702g4690gac4eg63c6e785fa15Text UUID: ae7ec1c3-0813-4b93-94fd-8b97ce88870cTimeline Phase Index: 108Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3828bf40-72df-47c6-8889-b49e0f7458daTimeline Phase Duration: 44.62sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Group ID: 3828bf40-72df-47c6-8889-b49e0f7458daGroup Index: 0
        • +
          51.Origin_Intro_Laezel: You know the history. Long ago, the ghaik enslaved our people. They dominated our minds and bred us for war, until great Mother Gith took a hammer to our bonds.Githyanki

          Flags and Tags

          ruletagtype rule
          • Githyanki {e49c027c-6ec6-4158-9afb-8b59236d10fd}

          Text

          Variant 1

          combine=0
          • Githyanki
          You know the history. Long ago, the ghaik enslaved our people. They dominated our minds and bred us for war, until great Mother Gith took a hammer to our bonds.
          he4900a39gccdcg4e84gb0b7g0dd286b1e165 | dc3dcef2-47c5-4a70-b673-05bf2debc0f2 | stub

          Variant 2

          Long ago, the ghaik enslaved my people. They dominated our minds and bred us for war, until great Mother Gith took a hammer to our bonds.
          h08ea2422gfdfcg4adbg98dfg976672e5342b | 03bbcaf6-5898-460b-885a-2785e265bcaa | stub

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 17044f0e-3c1d-415c-b914-d0c2996d0335Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text 1 Handle: he4900a39gccdcg4e84gb0b7g0dd286b1e165Text 1 UUID: dc3dcef2-47c5-4a70-b673-05bf2debc0f2Text 2 Handle: h08ea2422gfdfcg4adbg98dfg976672e5342bText 2 UUID: 03bbcaf6-5898-460b-885a-2785e265bcaaGroup ID: 3828bf40-72df-47c6-8889-b49e0f7458daGroup Index: 1
          • +
            415.Origin_Intro_Laezel: From the day of our hatching, young gith have one purpose: to train hard enough to slay a ghaik and take its head.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9e3aaa1f-74c4-46fb-a2dc-c1e61f1e863aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h2fbb454eg6969g4881g9162gd1bd87c59b01Text UUID: 5962bfde-a672-494b-8e41-2a9925c623f6Group ID: 3828bf40-72df-47c6-8889-b49e0f7458daGroup Index: 2
            • +
              370.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Then we speak the Rite of Ascension, and a red dragon comes to fly us to Vlaakith in Tu'narath, City of Death.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8ec71b4d-048d-4706-8504-e68627aec74eSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h72694a37g356eg47b1ga52fg908747125318Text UUID: 991863a9-78a3-4656-9de9-f939364b07f1Group ID: 3828bf40-72df-47c6-8889-b49e0f7458daGroup Index: 3
              • •
                106.Origin_Intro_Laezel: We are honoured with an eternal home in the Astral, celebrated for our victory. We are ascended.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2bd41c57-bea6-40e6-9ff1-acbc5eba1aafSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hb27bbe25g9ad3g4d30g90dbg73e2b5a1d596Text UUID: 2580f25a-514a-40e2-aeae-ae21f17e7f86Group ID: 3828bf40-72df-47c6-8889-b49e0f7458daGroup Index: 4
    • +

        483.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Ascension is a young githyanki's greatest honour.

          331.Origin_Intro_Laezel: You know the history. Long ago, the ghaik enslaved our people. They dominated our minds and bred us for war, until great Mother Gith took a hammer to our bonds.Githyanki

          Flags and Tags

          ruletagtype rule

            190.Origin_Intro_Laezel: From the day of our hatching, young gith have one purpose: to train hard enough to slay a ghaik and take its head.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4c7e44dd-5da2-42a7-93e6-0e36939c3fc1Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h79290748g8e94g41e4ga92eg2401d8fbc4a1Text UUID: 0b249086-d2b3-4a96-8988-fa7cbb8fe198Group ID: b5e19e60-99cc-4a5f-a2ca-c2e66f0795b0Group Index: 2
            • +
              591.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Then we speak the Rite of Ascension, and a red dragon comes to fly us to Vlaakith in Tu'narath, City of Death.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e2ba023e-93f5-4ebe-8517-272fdcdba139Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hdc24ef6ag9453g418cga465gd7790b6dbeebText UUID: 26d86899-0cbc-4817-bb72-debb682d7c10Group ID: b5e19e60-99cc-4a5f-a2ca-c2e66f0795b0Group Index: 3
              • •
                340.Origin_Intro_Laezel: We are honoured with an eternal home in the Astral, celebrated for our victory. We are ascended. Or so I believed.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 828d9e1c-70b9-4a41-871a-ab439d7fe746Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h7d9f4e88g2918g4a25ga3cbg797914b9de52Text UUID: 313975b2-34af-419c-bacf-e9f19073254cGroup ID: b5e19e60-99cc-4a5f-a2ca-c2e66f0795b0Group Index: 4

          126.Origin_Intro_Laezel: K'liir's clutch held three dozen eggs, more or less, though I've learned of crèches that harboured a hundred.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 32a9b330-10f6-4341-90f5-3063df459be4Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h450fa583g5d07g47c3g888ege1a11efc1b41Text UUID: 536a8538-5703-4f66-8f96-cd614819fda5Timeline Phase Index: 155Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 32a9b330-10f6-4341-90f5-3063df459be4Timeline Phase Duration: 9sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
          • +
            326.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I have never learned, however, of a varsh obsessed with a late egg's survival.CRE_Hatchery_GlobalHasMet_Caretaker

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Global
            • CRE_Hatchery_GlobalHasMet_Caretaker {5abb76c7-ca25-57a1-6e46-f7c80ad31600} = True

            • +
              302.Player: I know of the egg-layers - the shu'kyani - but I've never seen one for myself.Githyanki

              Flags and Tags

              checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
              • Githyanki {e49c027c-6ec6-4158-9afb-8b59236d10fd} = True

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 7593c9e7-e93e-4891-8367-ec16de61c665Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h29937232g363eg41efg8cd3g619b02eaf9b5Text UUID: a1c93c99-f724-4a66-8937-35626f7d61e3Show Once: True
              • +
                658.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Nor have I. They come to the Material Plane just long enough to pass their eggs.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fcd95e1e-c3c0-4474-aca4-34eea6feffc5Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h477eb1cag1bbcg4f6fg8a12g09686261db0eText UUID: 0e47ed7a-aac2-4d3f-a739-c5b569324b8bTimeline Phase Index: 132Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fcd95e1e-c3c0-4474-aca4-34eea6feffc5Timeline Phase Duration: 20.69sTimeline Phase Shots: 6Group ID: fcd95e1e-c3c0-4474-aca4-34eea6feffc5Group Index: 0
                • +
                  375.Origin_Intro_Laezel: They must, of course - the eggs could never mature in the Astral Plane, where time barely passes.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 913726cc-5839-40dc-aa44-492520aa9ba6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hd1dfee04gbcf2g48d6gb634g59b47a466a83Text UUID: cf8bda23-ccf4-4b5b-9ae5-cf5f4197a543Group ID: fcd95e1e-c3c0-4474-aca4-34eea6feffc5Group Index: 1
                  • +
                    198.Origin_Intro_Laezel: It is a great honour to be chosen as shu'kyani.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 50231967-074d-4485-8d19-c01c91a6c6f0Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: he4111c56g4a8cg40bcgb00eg18841d4a3594Text UUID: b96b453f-5fc1-4c13-a1b1-950cad58abbfGroup ID: fcd95e1e-c3c0-4474-aca4-34eea6feffc5Group Index: 2
                    • •
                      298.Origin_Intro_Laezel: One that I hope is never bestowed on me.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 73ef4438-7243-4b56-b7b6-bac60776b5b4Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hb373ffb8g8d76g464agb8b1ge56ad4958d38Text UUID: e74040a8-5725-450a-aee2-f48bde6e2b7dGroup ID: fcd95e1e-c3c0-4474-aca4-34eea6feffc5Group Index: 3
            • +
              240.Player: I've often wondered how we evolved to lay eggs.Githyanki

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5dd7bdce-f262-428b-b0ff-515e4c49f67bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h13ac23b7g6d8eg467dgbe3ag831a8fb44a28Text UUID: 838a81ed-313e-4817-bd11-dd1b35c6ec63Show Once: True
              • +
                17.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Indeed? Perhaps you might have paid more mind to your teacher.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 03dfefb1-8592-451d-ad76-c87f16b82f58Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h7ba98217g2a3dg447bg931eg164348bd3e1aText UUID: df958972-14ab-480e-9d3c-9eccec657357Timeline Phase Index: 114Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 03dfefb1-8592-451d-ad76-c87f16b82f58Timeline Phase Duration: 4.84sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                • •
                  267.Jump to Node 122

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: JumpUUID: 6614c74f-5234-4744-8582-61dbe33604e3Jump Target: Node 122 (3099a19f-620e-40f4-93f6-e3fa6401cfa6)Jump Target Point: 1
            • +
              395.Player: Githyanki look quite humanoid. How did you evolve to lay eggs?!Githyanki

              Flags and Tags

              checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
              • Githyanki {e49c027c-6ec6-4158-9afb-8b59236d10fd} = False

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 9a9714db-1d8b-4ac0-826f-f72a29410f8eSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h9cf403b3g8209g4806gb97ag51cbe3f5e242Text UUID: 3bda6776-d441-43c3-b8a2-a15f77290888Show Once: True
              • +
                508.Origin_Intro_Laezel: 'Humanoid'. How I despise the term. Githyanki are quite superior to humans.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c1eb6296-728b-4203-aca7-b3879bf2230cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h5037a371g71b2g4d9ega295gea0fd7fcc5d7Text UUID: c750bff5-d794-43ae-b931-4d989499814fTimeline Phase Index: 81Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c1eb6296-728b-4203-aca7-b3879bf2230cTimeline Phase Duration: 7.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                • +
                  544.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Though it must be said: you are an uncommonly adequate member of your species.Human

                  Flags and Tags

                  checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                  • Human {69fd1443-7686-4ca9-9516-72ec0b9d94d7} = True

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d330a776-09c8-44e6-abcb-2979dcaeb77fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: haab3f480gad41g4ea3ga417gda3ef70ab9cfText UUID: 72fc7501-5a95-43e5-a7bb-290ab9b6fc86Timeline Phase Index: 45Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d330a776-09c8-44e6-abcb-2979dcaeb77fTimeline Phase Duration: 6.19sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Optional: True
                  • +
                    122.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Our biology slates state that githyanki came to lay eggs after we escaped illithid enslavement and took to the Astral Plane.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3099a19f-620e-40f4-93f6-e3fa6401cfa6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h350f56f7g5d78g44cbgbe82g098b76c9031eText UUID: 9dfb76ba-85e6-4193-94dd-4fcc084639fdTimeline Phase Index: 131Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3099a19f-620e-40f4-93f6-e3fa6401cfa6Timeline Phase Duration: 24.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 3099a19f-620e-40f4-93f6-e3fa6401cfa6Group Index: 0
                    • +
                      341.Origin_Intro_Laezel: It's an asexual process - a favourable change, by any estimation.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 82bc68ec-c1d1-4f8d-a3c2-50fe5be48e74Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h387ab303g9cb9g425cg9e02ga7dbdbe56f80Text UUID: b9002c08-4fcb-4b57-982f-cac2438fa82dGroup ID: 3099a19f-620e-40f4-93f6-e3fa6401cfa6Group Index: 1
                      • •
                        120.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Hideous, to imagine a life where I couldn't partake in the pleasures of sex without the looming threat of bearing children.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 302ecaa7-67c4-42f2-a74e-06c3da6264c5Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h3bb202d3g7ab4g41d1gb903g47d47a46609eText UUID: 8d47b318-80e2-4297-9406-17303cf79499Group ID: 3099a19f-620e-40f4-93f6-e3fa6401cfa6Group Index: 2
            • +
              589.Player: Who does the laying? I'm curious about the logistics.!Githyanki

              Flags and Tags

              checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
              • Githyanki {e49c027c-6ec6-4158-9afb-8b59236d10fd} = False

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: e1bfe141-1aeb-4e11-aaca-2da916be77acSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hbfec7c82gb1c5g4253gb9b8gdf16415bbe67Text UUID: 9b4ec887-cf3e-482e-ab12-d599820b0ec3Show Once: True
              • +
                514.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Shu'kyani. Githyanki chosen by Vlaakith herself to bear young.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c6a64b24-304d-4fbf-b557-622460bf0f76Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h64167cc5g9287g425egb4a3gc196582fbb7eText UUID: 58596a94-56fb-4644-829b-04ab51663cc0Timeline Phase Index: 38Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c6a64b24-304d-4fbf-b557-622460bf0f76Timeline Phase Duration: 25.42sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Group ID: c6a64b24-304d-4fbf-b557-622460bf0f76Group Index: 0
                • +
                  618.Origin_Intro_Laezel: The queen assigns when and where they must lay, and how many eggs they must bear.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: eb086ebc-534c-43e1-80c5-dd689e0197e4Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h4fddd04fg5198g49d0gbfd0gf729584e4578Text UUID: 84f8f859-d890-4c29-b87d-127d9999d91fGroup ID: c6a64b24-304d-4fbf-b557-622460bf0f76Group Index: 1
                  • +
                    373.Origin_Intro_Laezel: The shu'kyani pass their eggs in the Material Plane. In the Astral, time barely passes.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 908c472c-126a-40e1-9453-a7c3259c4f6aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h80ed7df0g33cag4f97gbcccg5cbbc6442ab7Text UUID: 6563b3bd-422e-4279-8921-05f76e79c5d4Group ID: c6a64b24-304d-4fbf-b557-622460bf0f76Group Index: 2
                    • •
                      339.Origin_Intro_Laezel: It is a meticulous process, carefully timed so that the eggs hatch at once.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 81e29d68-96d5-4997-b146-19539330d050Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hd46e48c8g0f2cg4608ga697g088068e1e93eText UUID: 60431b3c-f1b8-42a6-b0c1-1c0b11320241Group ID: c6a64b24-304d-4fbf-b557-622460bf0f76Group Index: 3
            • +

      The crèche training room was - illuminating. Was your sa'varsh ever so brutal?

        479.Origin_Intro_Laezel: He would never have deigned to threaten a youngling. A waste of time and energy.Githyanki

        Flags and Tags

        checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
        • Githyanki {e49c027c-6ec6-4158-9afb-8b59236d10fd} = True

        • +
          609.Origin_Intro_Laezel: The pupils themselves culled the weak from their ranks.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e8fe0f91-5102-411e-8952-b87d2f744195Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h3fde1801ge4b9g4a1eg9bd1g6b2dfc7e5d01Text UUID: bbeb8eec-3e94-4576-8429-7f1cb976f29aTimeline Phase Index: 55Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e8fe0f91-5102-411e-8952-b87d2f744195Timeline Phase Duration: 3.34sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
          • +
            202.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I myself felled four of my own classmates once K'liir had a hundred times circled Toril.!Githyanki

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
            • Githyanki {e49c027c-6ec6-4158-9afb-8b59236d10fd} = False

            • +
              337.Player: That's awful. Is life not precious to the githyanki?

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 80f20d8d-0e66-4513-84ad-5ad1cbfcbf32Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h6ddceb9fg2529g44c7gbd2egd0f13bd85ce0Text UUID: 6be98fc0-6b79-48b2-9ee1-c05192966403Show Once: True
              • +
                70.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Not every life is equal.

                    617.No Speaker: Alias to Node 46

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: AliasUUID: eafd1d67-c3b3-4015-a229-d7fc4539ce54Speaker: -1 (No Speaker)
                    • +
                      46.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Their lives were not precious. They were a blight that required expunging.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 16302b5e-135e-4219-95b6-57d1c00db5e6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h8bca05dbg6eaag4369gb262g031bdfb44cecText UUID: bacbe986-7ea1-4aa5-8aeb-aa162c077b26Timeline Phase Index: 127Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 16302b5e-135e-4219-95b6-57d1c00db5e6Timeline Phase Duration: 5.41sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                      • +
                        647.Origin_Intro_Laezel: The githyanki are only as powerful as their weakest warrior. Jhe'quith dvenzir - the termination of the frail - strengthens us.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f7e8fafa-9711-48dc-9dc0-0346d0a7ada6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hea68eb7eg37d3g4d21g9418g7c4368b285ebText UUID: d4a57e5b-5270-4b35-b065-b3a7c0db2e2fTimeline Phase Index: 62Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f7e8fafa-9711-48dc-9dc0-0346d0a7ada6Timeline Phase Duration: 10.03sTimeline Phase Shots: 3

              295.Player: For what reason? Rage? Entertainment?

              • +
                431.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Survival.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a2cca4bb-e124-478a-a53b-926d76a99332Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h1922c077g3f3dg492fgbf81ge8707eb6d4a7Text UUID: 1a339996-1a2a-4e7d-b8bb-9bae6763342bTimeline Phase Index: 64Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a2cca4bb-e124-478a-a53b-926d76a99332Timeline Phase Duration: 1.63sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                • +
                  511.Origin_Intro_Laezel: My people have no use for cowards. Every trainee that I slayed was either too weak to withstand the lessons -

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c3d63b4e-6d2a-4b26-bbf8-e3e8d4f097baSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h7bc3ca8cg3f97g4589g9707g490c5800a800Text UUID: b790ce63-4b5f-475c-80c5-ef3f9865e36cTimeline Phase Index: 82Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c3d63b4e-6d2a-4b26-bbf8-e3e8d4f097baTimeline Phase Duration: 7.43sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                  • +
                    9.Origin_Intro_Laezel: - or was cocky enough to pick a fight they could never win.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 02a3d23c-dc68-4918-868f-3ecbce6f9ff2Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h351a99acg4782g4179g8d58g93478d5f3854Text UUID: 05f03aae-f5b0-4bfa-a681-9bd02ac4dac2Timeline Phase Index: 111Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 02a3d23c-dc68-4918-868f-3ecbce6f9ff2Timeline Phase Duration: 3.96sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                    • +
                      164.Origin_Intro_Laezel: They underestimated me. So they paid the price.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4324a817-de5d-4801-ad89-9dee04c12a53Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h0828b97cgd9f6g4e47ga9d2ge979da321cbcText UUID: 32daf8ec-9fd2-438e-bb68-6dc09be7c7cfTimeline Phase Index: 161Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4324a817-de5d-4801-ad89-9dee04c12a53Timeline Phase Duration: 4.6sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                      • See Node 647 (Origin_Intro_Laezel) The githyanki are only as powerful as their weakest warrior. Jhe'quith dvenzir - the termination of the frail - strengthens us.
            • +

      • +
        664.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Entirely. I was as devoted to my studies as I was to my training.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: feeb5a1e-a9e1-431e-a5fd-61eb5ed3dcdeSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h27a3266fg59cfg40c1g9911gf5193e4a0306Text UUID: df02d3e6-66da-4415-b552-94a9b2a38ed3Timeline Phase Index: 110Timeline Dialog Node UUID: feeb5a1e-a9e1-431e-a5fd-61eb5ed3dcdeTimeline Phase Duration: 20.13sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: feeb5a1e-a9e1-431e-a5fd-61eb5ed3dcdeGroup Index: 0
        • +
          8.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Each crèche contains a zaith'isk purification device. So I learned from the writings in the K'liir library.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 01fd716f-4201-4440-be23-66e6617f8a9cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h97b7dcb1g8039g477ega402g64257913be15Text UUID: 95082751-9543-4bdb-9ec3-c9467c80b3aeGroup ID: feeb5a1e-a9e1-431e-a5fd-61eb5ed3dcdeGroup Index: 1
          • +
            109.Origin_Intro_Laezel: The library was a gift from Vlaakith herself, that we may gain total understanding.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2cb670a8-b9b4-4a64-b18a-b0a0997002edSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h1d07d549g8500g40f0g8e41g50257d6b8d05Text UUID: a40dd034-25c5-47cd-8bc9-734f93387592Group ID: feeb5a1e-a9e1-431e-a5fd-61eb5ed3dcdeGroup Index: 2
            • +
              95.Player: My own varsh taught us nothing of this purification.Githyanki

              Flags and Tags

              checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
              • Githyanki {e49c027c-6ec6-4158-9afb-8b59236d10fd} = True

                524.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Or you simply weren't listening.

                        226.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Now I have seen you enlightened, I will report your progress to Vlaakith herself, once I ascend.

              304.Player: That kind of wisdom is very valuable.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 76fdd82c-f073-43f9-b2ed-977911b8d4feSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: heba7c93ag9ec3g4720ga8d8gc71b7b3843beText UUID: 2b339d88-1a1f-470d-80df-550816f63070Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: ebeac1f7-77c4-425b-bebc-19744166d282

                • +
                  26.Origin_Intro_Laezel: The planes are ever quaking, and their peoples ever shifting. The githyanki possess an eternity of knowledge...

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 098b25e4-c66b-463a-b4a9-04e840a339caSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h83bf516cg50bcg4034gab6ega27e125597d1Text UUID: 14d2bfa4-8118-4add-993c-562d2a2f0acdTimeline Phase Index: 119Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 098b25e4-c66b-463a-b4a9-04e840a339caTimeline Phase Duration: 8.56sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                  • +
                    634.Origin_Intro_Laezel: ... yet we still collect more. Infinities upon infinities.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f11d3bb5-b801-4975-b9d7-a1ee19887519Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hde3545bbg02d5g4340g93ebg9fb3671c78bdText UUID: b8f5a0b5-bc1c-47c8-89bd-40fc96f08f49Timeline Phase Index: 60Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f11d3bb5-b801-4975-b9d7-a1ee19887519Timeline Phase Duration: 6.36sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                    • See Node 646 Return level 1
            • +
              309.Player: Books are fallible, as are those who write them.!Githyanki

              Flags and Tags

              checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
              • Githyanki {e49c027c-6ec6-4158-9afb-8b59236d10fd} = False

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 79ed8ba4-8b8e-4fa8-a8af-a20ea84a56fbSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h8c3ee53fgdafdg4f44g94e3gd7d563e609a7Text UUID: 669579b1-ed34-41ee-af20-d0be9022d4e8Show Once: True
              • +
                571.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Not books, but slates. Wisdom so profound it is etched into stone. Truth as perfect as the Queen who decreed it.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: db2fd8ae-0758-478d-928e-25514b2df85aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h8aee0e73g007dg49fdg9eacg9ee21a8add79Text UUID: c72f26ce-efe0-42b1-841d-c27b59e9bb80Timeline Phase Index: 48Timeline Dialog Node UUID: db2fd8ae-0758-478d-928e-25514b2df85aTimeline Phase Duration: 9.74sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                • See Node 247 (No Speaker) Alias to Node 26
            • +
              30.Player: Total understanding? Absolute nonsense.!Githyanki

              Flags and Tags

              checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
              • Githyanki {e49c027c-6ec6-4158-9afb-8b59236d10fd} = False

              • +
                356.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I will not brook your ignorance.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 89ae6058-0923-4569-8155-b1747487e8cdSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hbe204aebg5bdcg4904ga3a7g53c65ebb7a3bText UUID: 697bf81b-355c-4612-9020-19239165e5d7Timeline Phase Index: 19Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 89ae6058-0923-4569-8155-b1747487e8cdTimeline Phase Duration: 2.65sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                • +
                  555.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Countless scholars roam the Astral Sea and beyond - observing the ways of our lessers, exploring planes so distant, order turns to chaos and cold fires rage.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d63ec07c-4e97-4c1c-8bad-d51aa5cb4392Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h98ff97f0gd8e4g4680ga2d6g6421d41a977bText UUID: 4cf39835-ed64-4bfa-9407-e88c33c72531Timeline Phase Index: 46Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d63ec07c-4e97-4c1c-8bad-d51aa5cb4392Timeline Phase Duration: 13.11sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                  • +
                    12.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I know what you can barely fathom. That you cannot bear it makes it no less true.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 034dc93c-36bd-40fd-bfe2-d515f4b9dda9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h3c463830g4064g4997g99a2g66f2831efb46Text UUID: c67b342b-5f99-4959-851f-b41e063ab077Timeline Phase Index: 112Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 034dc93c-36bd-40fd-bfe2-d515f4b9dda9Timeline Phase Duration: 7.73sTimeline Phase Shots: 3
                    • See Node 646 Return level 1
    • +
      142.Player: These dreams linger in my memory. Do you think that strange figure will come back?ORI_Laezel_State_HadDaisyMissionStatement!VISITEDREGION_SCL_Main_A!VISITEDREGION_CRE_Main_A!LaezelinPart_Event_TalkedAboutDreamLaezelinPart_Event_TalkedAboutDream

        91.Origin_Intro_Laezel: It is a certainty.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2628f53f-f24c-4b4b-9519-a817eda7cee7Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h2ca08af2g30bcg4471ga6c8g04a46a195fe7Text UUID: f58ca9a6-53ab-4105-80d8-93260eee80e9Timeline Phase Index: 100Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2628f53f-f24c-4b4b-9519-a817eda7cee7Timeline Phase Duration: 9.95sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 2628f53f-f24c-4b4b-9519-a817eda7cee7Group Index: 0
        • +
          348.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I had assumed our parasites served a ghaik Elder. But I believe they serve a greater master still.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8709b069-5b21-4b59-bd07-830fc69b38eaSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hb7ec76fbgd5cfg47e4ga2c3ge92bed6a90ebText UUID: de8b103f-f0a1-4301-b91d-2ccd55e129a1Group ID: 2628f53f-f24c-4b4b-9519-a817eda7cee7Group Index: 1
          • +
            404.Player: A greater master? Who - or what - could that be?!Githyanki!Duergar!Gale

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player

            • +
              39.Origin_Intro_Laezel: A question that burns in my belly day and night.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0e884b5b-2bfc-48fe-ac95-f20de98a6cf7Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: he9ffafb8ga9f1g4933g9133gee7d097f13e8Text UUID: cd8fca09-533a-4436-acc1-53a6d9cbf076Timeline Phase Index: 124Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0e884b5b-2bfc-48fe-ac95-f20de98a6cf7Timeline Phase Duration: 9.97sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 0e884b5b-2bfc-48fe-ac95-f20de98a6cf7Group Index: 0
              • +
                594.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Elders and collectives abide by their own tenets. It would require a powerful Creed to unite them.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e3f19ade-1f95-4bb8-a9e5-eca68763190dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h66d37d40g508cg418fgbdf8gef9c241bb2deText UUID: c68a4a8b-618d-4f8d-8973-3474ceaef1f7Group ID: 0e884b5b-2bfc-48fe-ac95-f20de98a6cf7Group Index: 1
                • +
                  349.Origin_Intro_Laezel: And now this voice, this Creed, finds our own ears. If it reaches this plane, it may reach others.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 872927dc-1d8d-44f3-8eb4-482883f103aeSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hb8ffa3deg0e41g48c7ga7c6geb2ad12eb4a9Text UUID: c972f055-a6a0-4698-8804-ec8a1ea74236Timeline Phase Index: 40Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 872927dc-1d8d-44f3-8eb4-482883f103aeTimeline Phase Duration: 9.53sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                  • •

              602.Origin_Intro_Laezel: An elder brain. It lives without body, without armour, save the brine pool it inhabits.

              Metadata

                  636.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Many would nigh lose their minds just to near one. Even... well. Most would, and have.

              584.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Perhaps. 'Absolute' may be a mere pseudonym behind which this master hides.

              • +
                227.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Whatever this voice, whomever this master, it dominates dreams and unites minds.

            626.Player: Fever dreams born of the parasite. They should be ignored.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: ee8cb2b7-658f-4ba2-917e-85215ad86456Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h23aaec19gfcb6g4ab1ga9a2g9053af9d2294Text UUID: 49cb2d67-d04e-4ae0-b4fe-7c1210f2235aShow Once: True
            • +
              169.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Buffoonery - and you believe it no more than I do.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 44bc6c60-697b-48a3-b9e3-c375b72ab80aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hd4c62c06g11dfg4f65g89abgf13e1b3c01b5Text UUID: 55c82fa0-28c3-443c-9bf2-f215d70355cbTimeline Phase Index: 165Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 44bc6c60-697b-48a3-b9e3-c375b72ab80aTimeline Phase Duration: 4.03sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
              • See Node 227 (Origin_Intro_Laezel) Whatever this voice, whomever this master, it dominates dreams and unites minds.
          • +
            125.Player: A greater master than an elder brain? A ulitharid, perhaps?GithyankiDuergarGale

              351.Origin_Intro_Laezel: A ulitharid? A powerful servant, but a servant all the same.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 880fc2eb-e935-4720-9df8-7f52eb491fd6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h1ae2c5d9gcba4g42d2g8133g62cd220f1d6bText UUID: d5f6d5f6-d595-4ae6-847c-e06fc134d0a0Timeline Phase Index: 151Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 880fc2eb-e935-4720-9df8-7f52eb491fd6Timeline Phase Duration: 21.89sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 880fc2eb-e935-4720-9df8-7f52eb491fd6Group Index: 0
              • +
                191.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Few ghaik break free of an Elder's grasp. None could dominate our dreams or unite our minds alone.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4cbbd22f-61d4-48e9-955c-cb10cdde0339Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hf3bd13eeg24ebg4e9ega88bg42429aab8167Text UUID: 312af916-d438-4056-9034-3edc57bbce7cGroup ID: 880fc2eb-e935-4720-9df8-7f52eb491fd6Group Index: 1
                • +
                  448.Origin_Intro_Laezel: They unite under one Creed. And if it reaches our ears on this plane, it may reach others.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a83ed34c-09c5-4507-bd57-75c8e2ac8c3cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h9292326cg0f75g42a9gb13ag881faa8a537eText UUID: 4cf00515-8aad-440e-9550-bbd6ddb659a3Group ID: 880fc2eb-e935-4720-9df8-7f52eb491fd6Group Index: 2
                  • See Node 345 Return level 1
          • +
            533.Player: A collective, then - many Elders come together for greater ends.GithyankiDuergarGale

        380.Origin_Intro_Laezel: So I did, and he served his use. Most enthusiastically, I might add.

        Metadata

        • •

        42.Origin_Intro_Laezel: So I did. And she wanted only to talk.

      • +
        47.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I understand there's an aphorism among your kind. One of my cousins at Crèche K'liir uttered it, and I damned near sliced out her tongue for it.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 166051cb-614a-48d3-87f1-3e4d3ad4cac2Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h82ab0159gb9ffg4bf8gaef1g9902a20556a0Text UUID: fe46d12c-4dde-4ef1-8404-b97e91b88502Timeline Phase Index: 109Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 166051cb-614a-48d3-87f1-3e4d3ad4cac2Timeline Phase Duration: 23.71sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Group ID: 166051cb-614a-48d3-87f1-3e4d3ad4cac2Group Index: 0
        • +
          65.Origin_Intro_Laezel: 'Let bygones be bygones.'

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1d60974b-1fce-47aa-99d5-3f13c324a1adSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hadba0d55g8ee8g4701g87cdgac30241fd290Text UUID: 10e2f132-7c94-4704-b125-fafadde11720Group ID: 166051cb-614a-48d3-87f1-3e4d3ad4cac2Group Index: 1
          • +
            427.Origin_Intro_Laezel: The githyanki teach a different maxim: 'The sheathed blade remains just as sharp.'

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a240180c-4547-445c-baae-5cdf60a0a46dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h0eae4242g8c09g4447gb8d5g6bcc5717361bText UUID: f5ad3e4e-7e16-4670-b914-d9ffe91b631dGroup ID: 166051cb-614a-48d3-87f1-3e4d3ad4cac2Group Index: 2
            • +
              567.Origin_Intro_Laezel: What do you think of it, Shadowheart?

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: da16fd3d-c265-4951-9168-e43845bc53f7Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hbfb1ed67gb513g48ccgb1cfg53bb8a03962aText UUID: 9ce444f6-7cb8-415b-bb0c-c2337e8eecb1Group ID: 166051cb-614a-48d3-87f1-3e4d3ad4cac2Group Index: 3
              • +
                486.Player: I think I take your point. I'll try to stay on your good side.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: b97f3cd4-bdcc-4041-8106-cec333c4f067Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hb3a60343g5984g4a99gb44dg9f4d01ae1557Text UUID: 0df3d977-92b5-4d53-9163-a1c06daad876Show Once: True
                • +
                  170.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I ask for a certain modicum of respect.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 44fe8419-b0e6-4b8e-b409-3e85c320b809Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h614062bagbb52g4c23g8961g54fa9cff43eeText UUID: 8c793488-0a66-405e-a32d-4aebcd1021f9Timeline Phase Index: 166Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 44fe8419-b0e6-4b8e-b409-3e85c320b809Timeline Phase Duration: 17.24sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Group ID: 44fe8419-b0e6-4b8e-b409-3e85c320b809Group Index: 0
                  • +
                    444.Origin_Intro_Laezel: The more secrets you keep from me, the less respectful you are.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a7ca2555-7d5d-493c-9ac5-afa5ed130e4fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h3e08d0e1g53f8g45e5g8b65g80e2ddba764fText UUID: 0741fbdd-bdc9-4163-98cb-43f0a1844335Group ID: 44fe8419-b0e6-4b8e-b409-3e85c320b809Group Index: 1
                    • +
                      199.Origin_Intro_Laezel: And the less respectful you are, the stronger my urge becomes to unsheathe my allusive blade.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5031113d-68dc-4d6f-8c57-89e35caed9e1Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hff20cd37g34acg4a14g8071ge53696be0922Text UUID: 45028082-e297-4dc8-81f6-a8d624bc15a8Group ID: 44fe8419-b0e6-4b8e-b409-3e85c320b809Group Index: 2
                      • •

              • +
                610.Player: I need more assurance than an old githyanki metaphor.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: e919e564-5fc7-4a51-b625-1584762b03dfSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h9b232639g3cfdg4465gb472gc6a098322c1bText UUID: d7aa2754-6b44-4647-b64b-81023c6a5f86Show Once: True
                • +
                  378.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I will not attack if you give me no reason. Is that assurance enough?

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 928ee074-2cb0-480f-82df-f41c610ebd08Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h24e2d57dg41d7g4d8cg8c90gd14b3287c155Text UUID: c5efba38-ea83-46ee-a66f-9e204c233b89Timeline Phase Index: 10Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 928ee074-2cb0-480f-82df-f41c610ebd08Timeline Phase Duration: 5.73sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                  • +
                    25.Origin_Intro_Laezel: We may have reached a truce, but that does not mean my allusive blade will grow dull.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 091d9bc0-1194-4e48-a229-4d4322b03a4cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h4d6c5669g3eb2g43e6ga94cgc13d1ff08fdaText UUID: cb230f75-ca74-4f60-b083-e282c11a096aTimeline Phase Index: 117Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 091d9bc0-1194-4e48-a229-4d4322b03a4cTimeline Phase Duration: 13.28sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 091d9bc0-1194-4e48-a229-4d4322b03a4cGroup Index: 0
                    • +
                      154.Origin_Intro_Laezel: And the more secrets you keep, the stronger my urge will be to unsheathe it.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3dd23073-6987-4dfe-a43e-70639f396bb0Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h91db1398g3b40g4a8dgb3d5g327d1bd690beText UUID: 2acb2c98-3ff2-4797-aa5a-981035bc97f1Group ID: 091d9bc0-1194-4e48-a229-4d4322b03a4cGroup Index: 1
                      • See Node 294 Jump to Node 601
              • +
                56.Player: It's a good maxim. I might have said the same to you.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 18f16707-b591-4518-8a32-df7f2db4eefcSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5ba01235g1e40g4b9agaad0gd3762e783e8cText UUID: 26bad24d-a815-4e56-8043-ddaea3c51136Show Once: True
                • +
                  38.Origin_Intro_Laezel: There's much you might have said, but chose not to.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0e00b005-5ff6-478d-af18-86f0d7083e0fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hceffdaa2ge8b1g48c8g8097g9d20bd94fa44Text UUID: 0ab5f99c-42ca-4eb6-a4dc-bfadbd049a4bTimeline Phase Index: 123Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0e00b005-5ff6-478d-af18-86f0d7083e0fTimeline Phase Duration: 3.48sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                  • See Node 25 (Origin_Intro_Laezel) We may have reached a truce, but that does not mean my allusive blade will grow dull.
              • +
                90.Player: I'd like a straight answer. Is our quarrel over or not?

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 262334ad-96f3-440e-915a-20d0f2fd38abSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hbbf71708g3727g4f3bg98f1g587ac078e9bcText UUID: 27ce9304-e90d-477c-b6b1-524c8aa37b71Show Once: True
                • +
                  639.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Yes, for now.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f2ffa76c-0a8e-466e-9e8d-a43054ae26a7Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: ha9b6fd70g48bdg4a78gaa6ag1b9ed66346acText UUID: 420349bd-d4ab-4f00-98d9-27bba45ddd12Timeline Phase Index: 20Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f2ffa76c-0a8e-466e-9e8d-a43054ae26a7Timeline Phase Duration: 12.84sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: f2ffa76c-0a8e-466e-9e8d-a43054ae26a7Group Index: 0
                  • +
                    420.Origin_Intro_Laezel: But remember this: The more secrets you keep, the stronger my urge to unsheathe my allusive blade.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a13927c4-6f86-4c1f-8a6c-3e6ab130974dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hcd34b9e5g8215g484fgb75cg5c3fb6babf1eText UUID: 519b4dbd-db26-4157-a3e1-7fbb4826fd6bGroup ID: f2ffa76c-0a8e-466e-9e8d-a43054ae26a7Group Index: 1

        630.Origin_Intro_Laezel: It is over, where I am concerned.

        Metadata

        • +
          367.Player: That's a relief. We won't survive this if we don't stand together.

            624.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I will not be bearing the burden of the half-elf's deceit.

            371.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Yes - I presume your kind would sooner shelter in darkness than face conflict.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8f1fbe29-354f-47ad-91ec-bb74efb352c1Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: haddf5044gfaf7g4477g9312ga1b695c005b9Text UUID: 45e8bf36-e150-4751-98eb-506bc5376cd5Timeline Phase Index: 6Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8f1fbe29-354f-47ad-91ec-bb74efb352c1Timeline Phase Duration: 20.51sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 8f1fbe29-354f-47ad-91ec-bb74efb352c1Group Index: 0
            • +
              545.Origin_Intro_Laezel: A naive approach. Life is conflict. You may resolve it with words, or with might.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d33532fe-af4f-4a22-8355-08410634b8a6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h4b10cf78gc92fg4d6bgae3cg588deea60b51Text UUID: 032b7ff9-a7ab-408e-8b07-a3172f8bfdd2Group ID: 8f1fbe29-354f-47ad-91ec-bb74efb352c1Group Index: 1
              • +
                592.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Otherwise, it festers. It becomes a parasite of its own. Ignore it at your peril.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e336eed2-9afc-42bf-8516-65cded113798Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h0779d641g297cg48e5gb0f0gd719154b17a3Text UUID: 7fc8e3e2-20d9-4c67-88c9-7cd8a47eed2bGroup ID: 8f1fbe29-354f-47ad-91ec-bb74efb352c1Group Index: 2

            372.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Chk. I suppose I am as alien to you as you are to me. I know of your kind, but I do not often encounter them.

                578.Player: Come on now. Are they really that bad?

                • +
                  455.Origin_Intro_Laezel: You look out of proportion. An oversized lizard with delusions of grandeur.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ab3bab03-0292-445e-8b4d-508381265b52Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hef42dc0dga2fbg40eeg8a11gd23d7d4a8dc5Text UUID: 4f182b37-69f8-4d44-94cd-007919f3718cTimeline Phase Index: 72Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ab3bab03-0292-445e-8b4d-508381265b52Timeline Phase Duration: 5.65sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                  • +
                    316.Origin_Intro_Laezel: No matter - I don't intend to keep my eyes trained on you for longer than necessary.

          430.Player: I know of githyanki, but I've never met one.!Shadowheart

            612.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Of course you haven't. They would have cut you from navel to neck.

            • +
              467.Origin_Intro_Laezel: You are no less alien to me than I am to you. I know of your kind, but I do not often encounter them.

              Metadata

            463.Origin_Intro_Laezel: It is imperative we locate a crèche. You'd do well to observe more and question less.

        625.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Yes. In great detail. It starts with a fever and memory loss.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ee441690-8b9f-454f-bcd3-1a63427d6bbfSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h32c50f2fg4bd9g42a2g893dgb4b5a262648bText UUID: 853469d6-07e0-47a3-940f-0d32d1b24731Timeline Phase Index: 56Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ee441690-8b9f-454f-bcd3-1a63427d6bbfTimeline Phase Duration: 5.55sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
        • +
          144.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Then you start to hallucinate. Your hair falls out and you bleed from every orifice.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3a4bbbbf-f9b4-40b8-ae87-7886c828f522Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h38476232g279fg4d77g8b1eg800c2afeac39Text UUID: 2e654345-b798-4d2f-83fa-02ee7c9b9025Timeline Phase Index: 104Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3a4bbbbf-f9b4-40b8-ae87-7886c828f522Timeline Phase Duration: 25.87sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Group ID: 3a4bbbbf-f9b4-40b8-ae87-7886c828f522Group Index: 0
          • +
            556.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Your bones will change form. Your jaw will split to allow room for four great tentacles.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d655d188-7ea5-43cb-bc0a-c9908789f7acSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h22304986g5544g4302g960eg9ebf81969959Text UUID: eb52adb8-d8cc-4007-abda-0200cb4ae21eGroup ID: 3a4bbbbf-f9b4-40b8-ae87-7886c828f522Group Index: 1
            • +
              231.Origin_Intro_Laezel: All skin will turn to gore, and be shed to reveal new flesh underneath.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5b1b4011-5cef-4fc0-8792-1656d7575ed9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hfcf7dd16gc5bag4c65g85fcg4cf93a1e4bacText UUID: f4621619-881a-4473-878f-e1457da52294Group ID: 3a4bbbbf-f9b4-40b8-ae87-7886c828f522Group Index: 2
              • +
                107.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Then you have ceased to exist, and a mind flayer is born.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2bec1908-ccee-4806-b322-d6b3149f8609Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h730ef869g962cg4ee5g9df7geea0d7e9bb08Text UUID: b90d7f1d-ea71-4298-8075-70e609c9f4b5Group ID: 3a4bbbbf-f9b4-40b8-ae87-7886c828f522Group Index: 3
                • +
                  590.Player: That sounds awful. How are you so calm?

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: e25c33dd-ad75-4bc5-afa8-10e487a57830Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h98a5fb5age329g410eg8a87gab12c583769fText UUID: a24f28e6-ece0-484f-ae40-4fe51069b588Show Once: True
                  • +
                    220.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Because I do not intend to let this happen. Not to me, and if you stick with me, not to you.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 57ec2f03-6fe7-425c-a5f6-495b2c152c50Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h5289bfa3g77c9g4f53g8a76gd5052f762be9Text UUID: 2afd91c3-7aa2-46b7-b933-48615935d67eTimeline Phase Index: 141Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 57ec2f03-6fe7-425c-a5f6-495b2c152c50Timeline Phase Duration: 6.04sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                    • +

                        534.Origin_Intro_Laezel: The first symptoms should have long since started, though. That is what puzzles me.

              607.Origin_Intro_Laezel: The goddess of secrets? How telling.ShadowHeart_InParty_Knows_SharWorshipper

              Flags and Tags

              settype Global
              • ShadowHeart_InParty_Knows_SharWorshipper {634f858d-9b54-0711-e31f-075d304422ab} = True

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e81e8897-2d4d-43f4-8e09-caa3978b59d7Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h12104985gae13g4f72gad2agafd75dc2ab47Text UUID: 6cba7a08-7aa0-44cc-8ca9-bfc4e76fb160Timeline Phase Index: 120Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e81e8897-2d4d-43f4-8e09-caa3978b59d7Timeline Phase Duration: 32.66sTimeline Phase Shots: 8Group ID: e81e8897-2d4d-43f4-8e09-caa3978b59d7Group Index: 0
              • +
                487.Origin_Intro_Laezel: That you would shine a light into your own shadowed heart? More telling still.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b98443f7-83b2-42f9-a125-237368db803fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: he353d65bg58b1g48dcg9d61g32992779c05dText UUID: b63b69dd-2434-4798-9ea9-f7f6844f9ef5Group ID: e81e8897-2d4d-43f4-8e09-caa3978b59d7Group Index: 1
                • +
                  29.Origin_Intro_Laezel: A pearl of honesty - an unexpected and iridescent gift from a cleric of Shar.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0a52bb6e-23b8-4924-919f-8907e4187ab5Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h3b3bb8f8g2d4bg491fgac8cgb6efbb8d6339Text UUID: a4654d70-3cff-4e83-98c8-e6db10cd2013Group ID: e81e8897-2d4d-43f4-8e09-caa3978b59d7Group Index: 2
                  • +
                    560.Origin_Intro_Laezel: If it was offered in good faith, then I will offer mine in return.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d686c620-6970-46de-a36c-38e022053ba4Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h1280f708g7cf8g4b6ag8e28g586ebf36d123Text UUID: e8331f27-993d-43a8-966f-174c74384ab3Group ID: e81e8897-2d4d-43f4-8e09-caa3978b59d7Group Index: 3
                    • +
                      549.Origin_Intro_Laezel: You would do well not to squander it; a githyanki's goodwill is even rarer than a Sharran of integrity.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d4524a4a-35ec-42f9-956d-d22e48b3245dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h3c2a7202ga196g4df5g889fg2b92495b8ddeText UUID: 0aa3e5bf-ccf0-4470-b138-ea39f2fff31aGroup ID: e81e8897-2d4d-43f4-8e09-caa3978b59d7Group Index: 4
                      • •

              382.Origin_Intro_Laezel: The goddess of secrets? How telling.ShadowHeart_InParty_Knows_SharWorshipper

              Flags and Tags

              settype Global
              • ShadowHeart_InParty_Knows_SharWorshipper {634f858d-9b54-0711-e31f-075d304422ab} = True

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9495f295-5aaf-47e3-9cb0-b07d5caa3a60Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h829feb25g36f9g4599g8158gf64e5cda82f3Text UUID: c8bcd543-3cca-456b-bca9-8776b0a81a97Timeline Phase Index: 94Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9495f295-5aaf-47e3-9cb0-b07d5caa3a60Timeline Phase Duration: 29.02sTimeline Phase Shots: 6Group ID: 9495f295-5aaf-47e3-9cb0-b07d5caa3a60Group Index: 0
              • +
                631.Origin_Intro_Laezel: You hide in the Dark Lady's shadows, threading lies and mysteries out of her decaying weave.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f06609fe-0d25-4619-ab40-cbae859a20b3Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h90752a53g598fg49ebg883eg83f2be462d50Text UUID: e788f35f-d28f-40f1-8969-69916e1cddbfGroup ID: 9495f295-5aaf-47e3-9cb0-b07d5caa3a60Group Index: 1
                • +
                  250.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I can't say what you hoped to gain by lifting your veil, apart from rotting the air with lies yet untold.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 60a9a49f-6821-498f-ac03-df8b95e487faSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hca2c2353gd5a7g4347gaa06g9057b25993b9Text UUID: 5f3a9219-b49c-44df-a0cc-aac3fb3fe2a0Group ID: 9495f295-5aaf-47e3-9cb0-b07d5caa3a60Group Index: 2
                  • +
                    78.Origin_Intro_Laezel: But I must applaud your honesty, at very least.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 218dc858-7244-49f1-94f2-52fcd72aed23Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h7ca7695fg0496g47bcgb8fbg82156782755aText UUID: f09c5cf8-9bd5-4c33-be97-477dd1c20b8fGroup ID: 9495f295-5aaf-47e3-9cb0-b07d5caa3a60Group Index: 3
                    • +
                      442.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Now I know to keep a blade at the ready should you slink too close.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a691150f-5ae0-460e-ba8d-5009cd8c2501Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: he4266f96gea6ag4d4bg9844g513c3ec68f50Text UUID: e24d440f-bcd0-4c6a-9478-7b61c1c9b192Group ID: 9495f295-5aaf-47e3-9cb0-b07d5caa3a60Group Index: 4
                      • See Node 488 Jump to Node 601

      44.Player: Tell Lae'zel about the orb in your chest, and how it came to be there.!ORI_Laezel_State_ReactedToGalesConditionORI_Gale_State_GotOneMagicItem!ORI_Gale_Knows_SharedBomb!ORI_Gale_Event_BombDisarmedGaleORI_Laezel_State_ReactedToGalesConditionORI_Gale_Knows_SharedBomb

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 13cb093e-e39c-45c5-b440-ed63b4716011Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h68392626gf5d7g48dbg88dcg916ed79fb2d3Text UUID: 4cdd6f02-3b5a-4464-9e37-4c7e6df577d7Show Once: True
      • +
        461.Origin_Intro_Laezel: A quest for power and a goddess' retribution - a classic tale of hubris. A folly even the githyanki are known to suffer from.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: af93f202-803d-42e9-8658-4088cbd6fe7aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h1d61912bg434cg4f7bg8028g80a56dc20b98Text UUID: c3faa652-0098-45ad-9b4c-050278b7f8c4Timeline Phase Index: 158Timeline Dialog Node UUID: af93f202-803d-42e9-8658-4088cbd6fe7aTimeline Phase Duration: 50.55sTimeline Phase Shots: 9Group ID: af93f202-803d-42e9-8658-4088cbd6fe7aGroup Index: 0
        • +
          426.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Not that I could relate, of course.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a2359931-e058-4579-80b7-84737336f608Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h422e8ec2gd7bcg4badgb153gfecd78b2c193Text UUID: 5bab7c66-15a3-4d3f-879a-a8e887102e87Group ID: af93f202-803d-42e9-8658-4088cbd6fe7aGroup Index: 1
          • +
            596.Origin_Intro_Laezel: My choices seem simple enough. One: Slay you and be done with it. Two: Go my own way. Three: Keep you well-fed with powerful magic.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e4cab97d-2026-4455-94fb-475350e51f3fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h3419404eg53adg4c1fga374gdd35cd134309Text UUID: b3032c5e-ba17-437b-a499-15e234b8e3a7Group ID: af93f202-803d-42e9-8658-4088cbd6fe7aGroup Index: 2
            • +
              516.Origin_Intro_Laezel: The first two are tempting, I must say - but a good wizard's spells are as valuable to me as my blade is to them.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c6e3fe1b-4566-4ab6-aa5e-e4567eedcac0Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h6f549913g7544g4ed4g9a96g1cb35478df75Text UUID: 8dd50282-04a8-4730-934b-10d394df9aedGroup ID: af93f202-803d-42e9-8658-4088cbd6fe7aGroup Index: 3
              • +
                147.Origin_Intro_Laezel: So choice three it is: we will fatten you with the artefacts you require. And when I need your aid, I'll make certain you return the favour.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3afb85e1-0e14-4715-85bb-2e26c804f435Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h8d43f028g3b92g4b57gb560gc902c63b7d28Text UUID: a10be7cd-2604-4be0-8e9e-e0406a1e1e15Group ID: af93f202-803d-42e9-8658-4088cbd6fe7aGroup Index: 4
                • •
                  458.Origin_Intro_Laezel: A fair trade by any estimation.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: aca32db6-4e2e-479b-af41-8604e2d9db14Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h81630c6cg767dg49b2g922eg9c35756ee97eText UUID: 7816e9a4-5688-4016-a09a-84dce228db4dGroup ID: af93f202-803d-42e9-8658-4088cbd6fe7aGroup Index: 5
    • +
      102.Player: I'd like to talk about Elminster's visit.!ORI_Gale_Knows_Avatar_ReactedElminsterORI_Gale_Knows_SharedBombORI_Gale_Event_BombDisarmedGaleORI_Gale_Knows_Avatar_ReactedElminster

      Flags and Tags

      settype Global
      • ORI_Gale_Knows_Avatar_ReactedElminster {7ff035bf-0a38-34bb-f949-0bf2808094e1} = True

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 2a360b09-286d-43d4-b7df-38b3bc8e5a68Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc2767717g4d04g453fg81e5g407a9de0209aText UUID: 56180209-5029-47e3-8a9a-48b3a48b93cdShow Once: True
      • +
        171.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Yes, the Sage of Shadowdale. Some of his works have been translated to tir'su.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 45559d73-d3ca-451d-a2f3-f5738a2c0346Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hf234a5d9g9cc6g4294g88b9g2f4ea1f0cb94Text UUID: 1ad9307a-38a2-4129-80ee-70b706c50a5dTimeline Phase Index: 167Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 45559d73-d3ca-451d-a2f3-f5738a2c0346Timeline Phase Duration: 7.12sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
        • +
          550.Origin_Intro_Laezel: That doesn't mean his every word carries wisdom, however.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d4e89126-ae4a-4888-9e72-0814fc087da1Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hae2218cdgef66g4648g80a1g0623cae9b89eText UUID: 2d23b09f-0c37-4fdb-a89e-bb41613a7cfeTimeline Phase Index: 144Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d4e89126-ae4a-4888-9e72-0814fc087da1Timeline Phase Duration: 25.53sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: d4e89126-ae4a-4888-9e72-0814fc087da1Group Index: 0
          • +
            228.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Near as I can tell, your goddess demands faith - but holds no faith in you.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 59f197a4-eb06-4490-9fda-33c86f7f97f6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h32bfb005g27f9g4d8fg83c0gfee4ab7eaad6Text UUID: e98442ba-b5c4-4592-bc8e-e349a339f474Group ID: d4e89126-ae4a-4888-9e72-0814fc087da1Group Index: 1
            • +
              465.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Why else would she demand you sacrifice yourself and perhaps so many others?

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b1d3611a-44ad-4a12-bf46-ffa022baa43cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h877df60cgaaedg4caagb575g7f6ed9cc8bc5Text UUID: 79e4b6bb-94e1-4bcb-91e5-e0c63422fcd4Group ID: d4e89126-ae4a-4888-9e72-0814fc087da1Group Index: 2
              • +
                424.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Does she not think you can destroy the Absolute with your own immense talents? Does she not know the mighty company that you keep?

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a1b5f82a-f4c6-4830-bf3b-8ee3dc2452f0Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h9cb1235dgb3dbg4044gb61ag032872516595Text UUID: 994b65a9-f586-4684-9803-7620759a0520Group ID: d4e89126-ae4a-4888-9e72-0814fc087da1Group Index: 3
                • +
                  79.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Demanding Vlaakith may be, but she acts for the good of the githyanki people. Mystra is concerned only for herself.!Lae'zel is on the Orpheus path.

                  Flags and Tags

                  checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                  • Lae'zel is on the Orpheus path. {616688cd-b203-4f14-8c33-086bb83062a3} = False

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 23704095-c3e3-4038-8d49-d3c1b70c292aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hf8e10026g5efdg4d6dg9d5agda7b7d356aeeText UUID: 548f5451-0125-4029-b1e8-2eb7475b41deTimeline Phase Index: 95Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 23704095-c3e3-4038-8d49-d3c1b70c292aTimeline Phase Duration: 9.24sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Optional: True
                  • •
                    89.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Bah - perhaps you'd find forgiveness in a fiery death. But I can't help but wonder why you'd want it at all.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 25ac1a0c-8031-48a3-ab5f-d242ca2b46dbSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h6bcd21a1g1bebg4392g827eg7fffc04889bfText UUID: d236c9c1-0e03-49e8-ace6-05241b40ce8bTimeline Phase Index: 99Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 25ac1a0c-8031-48a3-ab5f-d242ca2b46dbTimeline Phase Duration: 11.16sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
    • +
      219.Player: I'd like to talk about Elminster's visit.!ORI_Gale_Knows_Avatar_ReactedElminster!ORI_Gale_Knows_SharedBombORI_Gale_Event_BombDisarmedGaleORI_Gale_Knows_Avatar_ReactedElminster

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 57deee73-1a95-4c0a-b513-e7e8717c25b4Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h9822cd37g84a0g4bc6g9d0eg1d524706c582Text UUID: 3a673ce6-500b-43fd-9839-bf7999f25466Show Once: True
      • +
        165.Origin_Intro_Laezel: My allies do so love to keep simmering secrets. Or explosive, in your case.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 43456916-14b5-41a1-a490-349c58293cecSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h4373c8e7g2d0ag4fe6ga03aga0faf36d18fcText UUID: 917fee60-ae88-4487-bf01-d888f8c746f0Timeline Phase Index: 164Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 43456916-14b5-41a1-a490-349c58293cecTimeline Phase Duration: 20.17sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 43456916-14b5-41a1-a490-349c58293cecGroup Index: 0
        • +
          546.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Hence your bearded visitor. Even the githyanki have heard tell of Elminster, the Sage of Shadowdale, you know. Some of his works have been translated to tir'su.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d36a67a1-6bf4-4485-a5e3-40c5cc526ba4Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hebb49b81g81ceg4457gaf4dge27262445ce6Text UUID: b10d95d4-6ae3-4822-9edb-d746b51c84bfGroup ID: 43456916-14b5-41a1-a490-349c58293cecGroup Index: 1
          • See Node 550 (Origin_Intro_Laezel) That doesn't mean his every word carries wisdom, however.
    • +

      2.Player: My past is a mystery to me. Could the parasite have caused that?!NIGHT_DarkUrge_IsobelKillOrder!ORI_DarkUrge_Knows_NoMemoriesDark UrgeORI_DarkUrge_Knows_NoMemories

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 002dbae1-483e-45fd-ab21-353aab69a2ceSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h1ec062d5g5610g4e87g8abegd52a54d8be2bText UUID: 4e2f3b89-7926-4274-aec8-8c0840abc417Show Once: True
      • +
        244.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Ceremophosis takes all of you - mind, body, soul. An ordinary tadpole would eat at your memories until they were lost to the void.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5fc78cd7-90ad-49b5-b623-65be2b556f59Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hd0db03d3g09cbg43e4gbee3g8cc6cfc1127eText UUID: ba4da842-6f6b-4ee0-8c53-eaded4125c90Timeline Phase Index: 133Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5fc78cd7-90ad-49b5-b623-65be2b556f59Timeline Phase Duration: 17.35sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 5fc78cd7-90ad-49b5-b623-65be2b556f59Group Index: 0
        • •
          201.Origin_Intro_Laezel: But our tadpoles are far from ordinary. I wonder if another factor's in play.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5106ab9f-e6dd-4e66-abb7-0da2a7e43bf8Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h29ba26ecg2c57g42aagad1agb00c002ed17bText UUID: 94e835cd-e661-46b6-8e54-85a248314ab1Group ID: 5fc78cd7-90ad-49b5-b623-65be2b556f59Group Index: 1
    • +
      598.Player: I've had these urges. I want to kill. I want blood.!NIGHT_DarkUrge_IsobelKillOrder!ORI_DarkUrge_Knows_ViolentDark UrgeORI_DarkUrge_Knows_Violent

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Global
      • NIGHT_DarkUrge_IsobelKillOrder {52916fa3-a23e-43b3-af5e-a41875ce7f47} = False

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: e61ea2d4-fb2f-4e7c-ae73-8872b8331eb8Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h786a1b24g8aefg4626gada7g4129ef9858d9Text UUID: b34e6d01-cf17-4e1a-8860-cf7c8bc8a392Show Once: True
      • +
        615.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Many a good warrior savours the scent of blood in the air. There's no shame in a capricious murder now and again.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ea1ab711-5cc6-44ee-9c9a-5207d6ddb365Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h088035c4gddcbg4bb6ga326g21d601ad1246Text UUID: 84d5ddc7-ba20-455c-93af-2bb164f2f269Timeline Phase Index: 23Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ea1ab711-5cc6-44ee-9c9a-5207d6ddb365Timeline Phase Duration: 25.55sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: ea1ab711-5cc6-44ee-9c9a-5207d6ddb365Group Index: 0
        • +
          265.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Too many, though, and you waste energy and dull your weapon.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 65b4c869-9bfe-45a3-9658-d06436dffc67Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h6ceb22adg7cdcg4032gbe8bg9e9639e7eee9Text UUID: 8f4db7ed-0170-44a1-ad9d-ff96a2a41267Group ID: ea1ab711-5cc6-44ee-9c9a-5207d6ddb365Group Index: 1
          • •
            557.Origin_Intro_Laezel: My suggestion: attack with purpose, and savour your kills. And if the urge proves too much, well, I'm sure we can find you a goblin or two to carve up.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d6566421-3998-4f11-940f-4fcfe40c308eSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hc900fa5cg531fg488fgbbf3g45e17986add3Text UUID: d0e69df8-1b13-4d08-82c1-4ba45d8fa265Group ID: ea1ab711-5cc6-44ee-9c9a-5207d6ddb365Group Index: 2
    • +

      • +
        74.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I'll tell you what I think anyway:

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 20702704-61a8-4516-b8c5-9c13e7afbc74Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hd7b8b532g8d62g40a0g8377gc99dcb6038f9Text UUID: 60bd303b-03b8-4ef7-a628-0ac166106d5bTimeline Phase Index: 90Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 20702704-61a8-4516-b8c5-9c13e7afbc74Timeline Phase Duration: 11.55sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 20702704-61a8-4516-b8c5-9c13e7afbc74Group Index: 0
        • •
          69.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I won't miss Alfira. But I won't stand for chaos. Govern your hunger, before it governs you.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1e5065d2-bde5-4418-b0cb-bde2efa918f7Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: ha0164896g15ffg46eegbb78g2a86ddf0861dText UUID: 94a80802-4ae2-42a2-a348-1f3cefb27609Group ID: 20702704-61a8-4516-b8c5-9c13e7afbc74Group Index: 1
    • +

        305.Origin_Intro_Laezel: You won't.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 77897bfd-6afe-4894-8bc8-058f57bbfe24Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: ha8c09ac9g5a27g4a9agb9b0gfaee9ed0fd3aText UUID: 36f84f7d-9073-4159-9903-2c9c6c28f16aTimeline Phase Index: 28Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 77897bfd-6afe-4894-8bc8-058f57bbfe24Timeline Phase Duration: 10.57sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 77897bfd-6afe-4894-8bc8-058f57bbfe24Group Index: 0
        • •
          377.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I will try to help you resist. But spill a single drop of my blood, and yours will flow in a gusher.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 926218ca-57f1-499e-b8f3-99f6f5c0fd2dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h695dbaf1gb1b4g436agb9e8g04cf05f7d109Text UUID: 5ab0f52e-d1b2-4752-9de1-aa3699d61125Group ID: 77897bfd-6afe-4894-8bc8-058f57bbfe24Group Index: 1
    • +

      • +
        499.Origin_Intro_Laezel: A fitting name. But have you become the Slayer - or has a Slayer merely found a host too weak to evict it?

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: be22e771-da34-4cf4-b2c6-fb7146bae435Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h050d49dfgfff5g4f44g90c6gd87751ff2902Text UUID: afdd3c74-17d9-4af2-85fa-c0628a6ac8fcTimeline Phase Index: 77Timeline Dialog Node UUID: be22e771-da34-4cf4-b2c6-fb7146bae435Timeline Phase Duration: 19.74sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: be22e771-da34-4cf4-b2c6-fb7146bae435Group Index: 0
        • •
          491.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I shouldn't need to say it, but - be careful who you take as an ally. Especially when that ally's taken residence inside you.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: baa42416-385a-4330-beee-d6008408aa97Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h8c699a3age2f3g4bbdgb0cbg72f907443d90Text UUID: 2c6e5b6d-1af7-4b6e-a68d-12465ec509ebGroup ID: be22e771-da34-4cf4-b2c6-fb7146bae435Group Index: 1
    • +

        319.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Yes. And owing to your dubious compulsions, we've lost crucial allies.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7bb1cf7a-fc73-4857-b672-d39b8d2265e3Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h71aa24ebg771ag4875gafa9g9858256123eeText UUID: 7e284a1b-b756-4d3d-9943-77481a97d21eTimeline Phase Index: 121Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7bb1cf7a-fc73-4857-b672-d39b8d2265e3Timeline Phase Duration: 11.03sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 7bb1cf7a-fc73-4857-b672-d39b8d2265e3Group Index: 0
        • •

        308.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I'm not surprised. You've become death incarnate. Mighty, yes. And altogether unpredictable and intractable.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 79c471e2-c9bf-4209-a1eb-694b9f06341dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h0c7a87a8gec0fg47e7gbf60gbed135984caaText UUID: 2d422fbf-f85f-4773-9c61-d320a4694f85Timeline Phase Index: 98Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 79c471e2-c9bf-4209-a1eb-694b9f06341dTimeline Phase Duration: 22.03sTimeline Phase Shots: 6Group ID: 79c471e2-c9bf-4209-a1eb-694b9f06341dGroup Index: 0
        • +
          83.Origin_Intro_Laezel: One day, perhaps soon, Bhaal will demand your fealty. You'll either muster the strength to defy him - or you will succumb.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2445cf2c-40bf-4bf2-aee4-7abbadf1fec4Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h994637c8g8e8ag46d6g8cf3gfcba1a048466Text UUID: cbd29988-a8a9-4185-96a6-f95968db9ddcGroup ID: 79c471e2-c9bf-4209-a1eb-694b9f06341dGroup Index: 1
          • •
            437.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I know how I'd choose.

            Metadata

        325.Origin_Intro_Laezel: You have vanquished the Slayer, as I knew you would. You are strong, you are mighty. You are you.

        Metadata

        330.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Lord Bhaal's Chosen. You must think yourself mighty for it.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7f002680-a264-41a3-b631-cf3527cd938bSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h8f2800c7gdd42g41ddgb87cga77cf1d7c32dText UUID: f56933c8-b918-4338-b85c-ff40c523c381Timeline Phase Index: 36Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7f002680-a264-41a3-b631-cf3527cd938bTimeline Phase Duration: 14.29sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 7f002680-a264-41a3-b631-cf3527cd938bGroup Index: 0
        • •
          650.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Yet you were already mighty. And you would have been mightier still if you'd defied him and your 'urges'.

          Metadata

          449.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Not that I hadn't thought about it. You were a better lay than I'd expected.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a8df3580-4499-4643-b179-ed49229e3238Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: he57dc000gef00g42aagbc12g76338a185d1eText UUID: 7367e827-0a74-427e-83ae-d146f52ba099Group ID: 69cf4a7d-58c8-4d2c-bbc3-b9771400cefaGroup Index: 1
          • +
            258.Origin_Intro_Laezel: But I've gone off the idea. We've an elder brain to destroy, and cannot risk unneeded distraction.

            Metadata

        538.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Mark my words, this power would be no blessing, but a curse.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d0de1d84-6618-4ee5-b3b3-8d2661ca6a6dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h88acde72g1621g4f03g81e5g6bb61ce22b23Text UUID: 0f91d5a7-7aba-4d7d-8d46-2b9913b21f55Timeline Phase Index: 80Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d0de1d84-6618-4ee5-b3b3-8d2661ca6a6dTimeline Phase Duration: 12.88sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: d0de1d84-6618-4ee5-b3b3-8d2661ca6a6dGroup Index: 0
        • +
          507.Origin_Intro_Laezel: You might as well ask me to gouge out my eyes for the promise of sight, or slice off my tongue for the promise of taste.

          Metadata

                              515.Origin_Intro_Laezel: You - you might be right.GLO_Daisy_State_IndividualAccepted

                              Flags and Tags

                              settype Object | speaker 0 Origin_Intro_Laezel
                              • GLO_Daisy_State_IndividualAccepted {8d442938-2051-4b53-8e4c-4dccb08f35f8} = True

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c6cd8c08-c7ac-4703-bcc5-3c0525076eaeSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h11586e3dg2fa1g40fdg8bcfg80e9651b0a07Text UUID: 45657e98-e200-4ad1-a223-2d4bced5c09aTimeline Phase Index: 16Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c6cd8c08-c7ac-4703-bcc5-3c0525076eaeTimeline Phase Duration: 26.8sTimeline Phase Shots: 6Group ID: c6cd8c08-c7ac-4703-bcc5-3c0525076eaeGroup Index: 0
                              • +
                                454.Origin_Intro_Laezel: The githyanki have long studied ghaik and used what we've learned. The zaith'isk itself was devised from such knowledge.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ab249a0d-616b-4fff-8413-1162282c134dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h3d9626e1g3fb9g436cg87e8g50ab06d7cb68Text UUID: 19e5940e-76da-46c9-8c51-f36290e18518Group ID: c6cd8c08-c7ac-4703-bcc5-3c0525076eaeGroup Index: 1
                                • +
                                  407.Origin_Intro_Laezel: The tadpole is perhaps not just a curse, but a weapon I can twist and mould to my advantage.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9c6e107f-98b2-4abe-b3ab-6893ab647241Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hf6cf2083g37e3g40bbg9640g5e9b9a17928aText UUID: 73755a10-ee9f-42f7-9703-5fa28b8ac95bGroup ID: c6cd8c08-c7ac-4703-bcc5-3c0525076eaeGroup Index: 2
                                  • +
                                    481.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Very well. I will swallow my disgust and avail myself of the parasite's powers.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b5aafce4-8744-4dec-940b-6dcf347d4e10Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h5078dcf4gd83dg4f97g98cdg01e8a308a40aText UUID: a89090cc-3c5c-4934-8fed-63e5a9f3413cGroup ID: c6cd8c08-c7ac-4703-bcc5-3c0525076eaeGroup Index: 3
                                    • •
